{"action":"opened","number":29740,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/pulls/29740","id":2044502371,"node_id":"PR_kwDOAAzd1s553KFj","html_url":"https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/pull/29740","diff_url":"https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/pull/29740.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/pull/29740.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/29740","number":29740,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"Fix algorithm cheat sheet links","user":{"login":"morags","id":5771389,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjU3NzEzODk=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5771389?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags","html_url":"https://github.com/morags","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/morags/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":"#### Reference Issues/PRs
\-

#### What does this implement/fix? Explain your changes.
The links in the [scikit-learn algorithm cheat sheet](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/machine_learning_map.html) were all broken, leading to 404 error pages (see eg. [Kernel Approximation](https://scikit-learn.org/modules/kernel_approximation.html), [SGD Regressor](https://scikit-learn.org/modules/sgd.html#regression)). I replaced the `./modules/` part of each URL with `./stable/modules/`, so they now link to the "stable" version of each page (eg. [Kernel Approximation](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/kernel_approximation.html), [SGD Regressor](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/sgd.html#regression)).

#### Any other comments?
\-

{"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/events","html_url":"https://github.com/conda/conda/issues/7876","id":372072973,"node_id":"MDU6SXNzdWUzNzIwNzI5NzM=","number":7876,"title":"Conda activate UnicodeEncodeError if non-ascii characters present in bash prompt","user":{"login":"chaturv3di","id":22843902,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjIyODQzOTAy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22843902?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di","html_url":"https://github.com/chaturv3di","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":14,"created_at":"2018-10-19T18:44:31Z","updated_at":"2022-02-01T19:36:46Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":" ## Current Behavior **Update**: The real reason for the error isn't any packages but non-ascii characters in the prompt. See [this comment below](https://github.com/conda/conda/issues/7876#issuecomment-431558009). I created a new environment and installed a bunch of packages, and started to run into this error as soon as I installed Cython. ```shell Downloading and Extracting Packages cython-0.29 | 2.1 MB | ##################################### | 100% Preparing transaction: done Verifying transaction: done Executing transaction: done # >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> ERROR REPORT <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/cli/main.py", line 98, in main return activator_main() File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/activate.py", line 632, in main print(activator.execute(), end='') UnicodeEncodeError: 'ascii' codec can't encode character '\u2718' in position 66: ordinal not in range(128) `$ /Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda shell.posix reactivate` ``` However, Cython is successfully installed. Without closing the shell, I could even install more packages like numpy, pandas etc. I get the same error after each installation but the package is successfully installed. I can verify this by importing the package and doing some elementary stuff. But essentially, conda is having trouble reactivating the environment. In a new shell terminal, I cannot activate any environment. The command `conda activate my_env` fails for all the environments that I have and produces the same error report [pasted in full in the Expected Behaviour section below]. ### Steps to Reproduce FWIW, these are the contents of my `.condarc`. ```shell channels: - anaconda - defaults - conda-forge channel_priority: True update_dependencies: False ``` I had created a new environment with `python=3.6`. This is the exact order of installation of packages. ```shell # Elpy related conda install jedi conda install -c anaconda flake8 conda install autopep8 conda install yapf # Add env to Jupyter conda install -c anaconda ipykernel python -m ipykernel install --user --name $env_name --display-name "Python3.6 ($env_name)" # Finally conda install cython ``` ## Expected Behavior You should see this. ```shell $ conda install cython Solving environment: done ## Package Plan ## environment location: /Users/namit/anaconda3/envs/hdbscan added / updated specs: - cython The following packages will be downloaded: package | build ---------------------------|----------------- cython-0.29 | py36h0a44026_0 2.1 MB anaconda The following NEW packages will be INSTALLED: cython: 0.29-py36h0a44026_0 anaconda Proceed ([y]/n)? Downloading and Extracting Packages cython-0.29 | 2.1 MB | ##################################### | 100% Preparing transaction: done Verifying transaction: done Executing transaction: done # >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> ERROR REPORT <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/cli/main.py", line 98, in main return activator_main() File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/activate.py", line 632, in main print(activator.execute(), end='') UnicodeEncodeError: 'ascii' codec can't encode character '\u2718' in position 66: ordinal not in range(128) `$ /Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda shell.posix reactivate` environment variables: CIO_TEST= CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV=hdbscan CONDA_EXE=/Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda CONDA_PREFIX=/Users/namit/anaconda3/envs/hdbscan CONDA_PREFIX_1=/Users/namit/anaconda3 CONDA_PROMPT_MODIFIER=(hdbscan) CONDA_PYTHON_EXE=/Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/python CONDA_ROOT=/Users/namit/anaconda3 CONDA_SHLVL=2 PATH=/Users/namit/anaconda3/envs/hdbscan/bin:/usr/local/git/bin:/Users/nami t/anaconda3/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/Library/ TeX/texbin REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE= SSL_CERT_FILE= active environment : hdbscan active env location : {"action":"created","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/conda/conda/issues/7876/events","html_url":"https://github.com/conda/conda/issues/7876","id":372072973,"node_id":"MDU6SXNzdWUzNzIwNzI5NzM=","number":7876,"title":"Conda activate UnicodeEncodeError if non-ascii characters present in bash prompt","user":{"login":"chaturv3di","id":22843902,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjIyODQzOTAy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/22843902?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di","html_url":"https://github.com/chaturv3di","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/chaturv3di/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":10,"created_at":"2018-10-19T18:44:31Z","updated_at":"2022-01-20T14:41:10Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":" ## Current Behavior **Update**: The real reason for the error isn't any packages but non-ascii characters in the prompt. See [this comment below](https://github.com/conda/conda/issues/7876#issuecomment-431558009). I created a new environment and installed a bunch of packages, and started to run into this error as soon as I installed Cython. ```shell Downloading and Extracting Packages cython-0.29 | 2.1 MB | ##################################### | 100% Preparing transaction: done Verifying transaction: done Executing transaction: done # >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> ERROR REPORT <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/cli/main.py", line 98, in main return activator_main() File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/activate.py", line 632, in main print(activator.execute(), end='') UnicodeEncodeError: 'ascii' codec can't encode character '\u2718' in position 66: ordinal not in range(128) `$ /Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda shell.posix reactivate` ``` However, Cython is successfully installed. Without closing the shell, I could even install more packages like numpy, pandas etc. I get the same error after each installation but the package is successfully installed. I can verify this by importing the package and doing some elementary stuff. But essentially, conda is having trouble reactivating the environment. In a new shell terminal, I cannot activate any environment. The command `conda activate my_env` fails for all the environments that I have and produces the same error report [pasted in full in the Expected Behaviour section below]. ### Steps to Reproduce FWIW, these are the contents of my `.condarc`. ```shell channels: - anaconda - defaults - conda-forge channel_priority: True update_dependencies: False ``` I had created a new environment with `python=3.6`. This is the exact order of installation of packages. ```shell # Elpy related conda install jedi conda install -c anaconda flake8 conda install autopep8 conda install yapf # Add env to Jupyter conda install -c anaconda ipykernel python -m ipykernel install --user --name $env_name --display-name "Python3.6 ($env_name)" # Finally conda install cython ``` ## Expected Behavior You should see this. ```shell $ conda install cython Solving environment: done ## Package Plan ## environment location: /Users/namit/anaconda3/envs/hdbscan added / updated specs: - cython The following packages will be downloaded: package | build ---------------------------|----------------- cython-0.29 | py36h0a44026_0 2.1 MB anaconda The following NEW packages will be INSTALLED: cython: 0.29-py36h0a44026_0 anaconda Proceed ([y]/n)? Downloading and Extracting Packages cython-0.29 | 2.1 MB | ##################################### | 100% Preparing transaction: done Verifying transaction: done Executing transaction: done # >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> ERROR REPORT <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/cli/main.py", line 98, in main return activator_main() File "/Users/namit/anaconda3/lib/python3.6/site-packages/conda/activate.py", line 632, in main print(activator.execute(), end='') UnicodeEncodeError: 'ascii' codec can't encode character '\u2718' in position 66: ordinal not in range(128) `$ /Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda shell.posix reactivate` environment variables: CIO_TEST= CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV=hdbscan CONDA_EXE=/Users/namit/anaconda3/bin/conda CONDA_PREFIX=/Users/namit/anaconda3/envs/hdbscan CONDA_PREFIX_1=/Users/namit/anaconda3 CONDA_PROMPT_MODIFIER=(hdbscan)
